allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const p='C:/Users/marco/.claude.json'; const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(p,'utf8'\)\); const before=d.mcpServers?Object.keys\(d.mcpServers\):[]; if\(d.mcpServers && d.mcpServers.mempalace\){delete d.mcpServers.mempalace;} fs.writeFileSync\(p, JSON.stringify\(d,null,2\)\); const after=d.mcpServers?Object.keys\(d.mcpServers\):[]; console.log\('before:',before,'after:',after\);")
